title: epipactis × bruxellensis
intro: Epipactis × bruxellensis, also known as the Brussels helleborine, is a hybrid orchid species resulting from the cross between Epipactis helleborine and Epipactis atrorubens. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Epipactis × bruxellensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable addition to traditional herbal medicine. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its health benefits.
